notes: Solid, complete Pong implementation with proper physics, AI, scoring, sound, and game states; minor issue is the serve direction logic (serves toward loser but labeled as 'serve to loser' yet direction assignment seems inverted — loser on left gets serveDirection=-1 meaning ball goes left away from them).

A solid and mostly complete Pong clone with correct presentation and no obvious runtime issues, but it is single-player only and has a few minor design/edge-case shortcomings that keep it from excellence.
